wizard.title: Let's set up the Currency Exchange
wizard.intro: To define a conversion you need at least 2 currencies in the project.
wizard.stepFirstHint: Create the first currency. e.g. Gold, Coins, Diamonds.
wizard.stepSecondHint: Create the second currency — something that makes sense to convert against the first.
wizard.afterHint: Each currency becomes its own project page — you can edit name, code and type later.
wizard.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the currency.

linkedField.invalidExplain: The linked column no longer exists. Pick another or clear the link.
linkedField.emptyOptions: No progression table in this section. Create one to link.

quickNewPage.modalHint: Shortcut: N · Enter to create · Esc to close

errors.titleRequired: Please enter a name for the page.

shortcuts.modalHint: Press ? anywhere to open this cheat sheet.

keys.addAddon: Add an addon to this page

items.label: Items
items.description: List of your game's items (wood, potion, key). Comes with inventory and buy/sell price ready.

equipmentItem.label: Items with Effect
equipmentItem.description: Items that change attributes when equipped or used (armor, amulet, potion). Comes with inventory, price and attribute bonuses.

characters.label: Characters
characters.description: Game characters with attributes (HP, ATK, DEF...) and per-level progression. Works for heroes, enemies or NPCs.

attributeDefinitions.label: Attributes
attributeDefinitions.description: A list of attributes (HP, ATK, DEF...) that can be reused across many characters.

economy.label: Economy
economy.description: Game currency (gold, gems, energy). Sets the name, symbol and basic rules.

progression.label: Progression
progression.description: XP and level table — how much XP each level needs and what each level gives.

recipe.label: Recipe
recipe.description: A recipe: ingredients in, item out. E.g. '2 Woods → 1 Plank'.

craftTable.label: Crafting Table
craftTable.description: A station that groups several recipes (Sawmill, Forge, Workbench). You pick which recipes it produces.

narrative.label: Narrative
narrative.description: Free-form text for lore, script or description — like a text document.

craftTablePicker.title: Select recipes for this Crafting Table
craftTablePicker.intro: Pick which existing recipes belong on this table. You can adjust later.
craftTablePicker.emptyState: No recipes created yet. The table will be created empty — you can add recipes later.

requiresDialog.introDefault: {page} pages usually need {required}. Pick how to link below.
requiresDialog.introCurrency: Every {page} page uses a currency for buy and sell values. Pick which currency to use — the page will also come with a ready discount and bonus.
requiresDialog.introItemIngredient: Which item goes into this recipe as an ingredient? You can use one that already exists or create a new one.
requiresDialog.introItemOutput: Which item comes out of this recipe? You can use one that already exists or create a new one.

recipeSettings.description: How much goes in, how much comes out and how long it takes. You can change this later on the recipe page.

characterSettings.description: Which attributes to create, and from which level to which level the character goes. You can change everything later.

economySettings.description: Base buy and sell prices for this item. Discounts and bonuses are separate pages — pick which ones apply or create new ones just for this item.
economySettings.useExistingDescription: Tick which discounts and bonuses apply to this item. If you pick several, the percentages stack.
economySettings.createNewLabel: Create a new discount and bonus just for this item
economySettings.createNewDescription: Creates a new discount and bonus that only affect this item. The existing ones stay the same.

attributeDefinitions.title: Attributes for {name}
attributeDefinitions.createNewDescription: Creates a new Attributes page with 4 attributes ready: HP, ATK, DEF and SPD. You can rename them, add more or remove any later. The same page can be reused across characters.
attributeDefinitions.skipDescription: Creates the character without attributes for now. You can link an attributes page later.

currency.title: Currency for {name}
currency.linkExistingHeader: Use a currency that already exists
currency.createNewDescription: Creates an Economy page with a basic currency (Coins). You can rename it, change the symbol and adjust later.
currency.skipDescription: Creates the page with no currency. Buy and sell fields stay empty until you link one.

itemIngredient.title: Ingredient for the {name} recipe
itemIngredient.linkExistingHeader: Use an item that already exists
itemIngredient.createNewLabel: Create a new item for the ingredient
itemIngredient.createNewDescription: Creates a new Item page for this ingredient, already with inventory and price. You can add more ingredients later on the recipe page itself.
itemIngredient.skipDescription: Creates the recipe with no ingredient for now. You can link an item later on the recipe page.

itemOutput.title: Output of the {name} recipe
itemOutput.linkExistingHeader: Use an item that already exists
itemOutput.createNewLabel: Create a new item for the output
itemOutput.createNewDescription: Creates a new Item page for the recipe's output, already with inventory and price. The name below becomes the page title.
itemOutput.skipDescription: Creates the recipe with no output defined for now. You can link an item later on the recipe page.

requiresDialog.createNewDescription: Creates the new page and links it for you.
requiresDialog.skipDescription: Creates the page with no link. You can link later.

pageCreationReview.title: Ready to create
pageCreationReview.description: Double-check what's about to be created and linked before confirming. If something's off, hit Back to adjust.

errors.exportFailed: Error exporting document. Please try again.

balanceAddon.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this balance addon?

linear.label: Linear
linear.tip: Linear increases at a constant pace (ex.: +50 XP per level). Use it when you want simple and predictable progression.

exponential.label: Exponential
exponential.tip: Exponential starts smooth and becomes heavier later. Great when early levels should be fast and endgame should be challenging.

tiered.label: Tiered
tiered.tip: Tiered progression splits levels into ranges and can apply stronger growth in each range. Useful for clear difficulty milestones.

softCap.label: Soft cap
softCap.tip: Soft cap grows quickly early and slows down near a ceiling without a hard stop.

hardCap.label: Hard cap
hardCap.tip: Hard cap enforces a strict maximum value. Useful to avoid runaway inflation.

diminishingReturns.label: Diminishing returns
diminishingReturns.tip: Each level increases less than the previous one. Good for stat/passive systems.

piecewise.label: By stages
piecewise.tip: Uses one pace before a breakpoint and another after it. Good for midgame/endgame shifts.

base.label: base
base.tooltip: Defines the starting point for values.
base.expected: Higher base makes early levels heavier. Lower base makes early levels lighter.

growth.label: growth
growth.tooltip: Controls how quickly values accelerate between levels.
growth.expected: Higher growth makes the curve ramp faster.

offset.label: offset
offset.tooltip: Constant value added at the end.
offset.expected: Positive offset raises all values; negative offset lowers all values.

tierStep.label: tierStep
tierStep.tooltip: How many levels each tier spans.
tierStep.expected: Lower tierStep changes tiers more often.

tierMultiplier.label: tierMultiplier
tierMultiplier.tooltip: How strong each tier jump is.

capValue.label: capValue
capValue.tooltip: Ceiling value used by cap-based formulas.
capValue.expected: Higher capValue allows stronger late game before stabilizing.

capStrength.label: capStrength
capStrength.tooltip: Strength of convergence to the soft cap.
capStrength.expected: Higher capStrength reaches the ceiling earlier.

plateauStartLevel.label: plateauStartLevel
plateauStartLevel.tooltip: Level where the second stage starts in piecewise mode.
plateauStartLevel.expected: Lower value makes the pacing shift happen earlier.

plateauFactor.label: plateauFactor
plateauFactor.tooltip: Growth reducer in the second piecewise stage.
plateauFactor.expected: Lower plateauFactor makes the late segment smoother.

progressionTableAddon.growthHintWithBias: With bias != 1, Growth is the effective rate between the endpoints. The per-level rate varies along the curve.
progressionTableAddon.biasHelpAria: Help about the curve bias parameter
progressionTableAddon.biasHelpBody: Keeps Base and the final value fixed but reshapes the curve between them. 1.0 = pure exponential. Greater than 1 = slow early growth, fast late (late-game grind). Less than 1 = fast early growth, flat late.
progressionTableAddon.biasHelpBodyLinear: Keeps Base and the final value fixed but reshapes the curve between them. 1.0 = pure linear. Greater than 1 = slow early growth, fast late. Less than 1 = fast early growth, flat late.
progressionTableAddon.stepHintWithBias: With bias != 1, Step is the average increment between the endpoints. The per-level delta varies along the curve.
progressionTableAddon.formulaHelpAria: Help about formula variables and functions
progressionTableAddon.formulaFunctions: Functions: min, max, round, floor, ceil, abs, pow
progressionTableAddon.clampApplied: Clamp applied to {count} value(s) in this column.
progressionTableAddon.autoIntervalAriaLabel: Auto-generate base and step/growth from interval
progressionTableAddon.resetAllOverridesAriaLabel: Reset all manual values in this column

warnings.growthMustBePositive: Growth must be greater than zero.

warnings.selectBaseColumn: Select the base column for the formula.
warnings.baseCannotBeSelf: The base column cannot be itself.
warnings.baseNoLongerExists: Selected base column no longer exists.
warnings.baseAfterColumn: Base column is after this column. Reorder to generate correctly.
warnings.minGreaterThanMax: Minimum is greater than maximum. Bounds will be swapped automatically.
warnings.outOfBounds: {count} value(s) are outside configured bounds in this column.
warnings.hasNonNumeric: There are non-numeric values (NaN) in this column.
warnings.hasNegative: There are negative values in this column.
warnings.invalidBias: Curve bias must be greater than zero. Falling back to 1.0.
warnings.brokenLibraryRef: The linked library field was not found. Using the last saved name as fallback.
warnings.autoIntervalExpNeedsPositive: Exponential requires both values to share the same sign and be different from zero.
warnings.autoIntervalRangeTooSmall: End level must be greater than start level.

persistencePage.errorHintNetwork: To see the full error: F12 → Network tab → click the failed 'sync' request (500) → Response tab.
persistencePage.errorSupabaseNonJson: Supabase returned a non-JSON response (e.g. HTML page). Common causes: project paused in Supabase dashboard; in production, wrong URL/keys in Vercel environment variables (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY). Check Supabase and, if using Vercel, the project env vars.

form.debounceHint: When automatic sync is on, delay after edit before scheduling upload.
form.autosaveHint: When automatic sync is on, sends changes every X ms. Recommended: 30000 (30s).
form.syncAutomaticHint: Off (default): sync only when you click "Sync now". On: sends changes periodically using the interval below.

syncBadge.pendingNoCredits: There are pending changes with zero credit cost (description/spotlight/cover)
syncBadge.previewClickHint: Click to see what will be synced
syncBadge.previewNoSectionChanges: There are no section changes. Home-page changes may still be pending.
syncBadge.discardButtonHint: Revert pending local changes to the cloud version
syncBadge.discardConfirmMessage: Discard this project's pending changes and restore the latest cloud state? Unsynced local changes will be lost.
syncBadge.discardErrorUnauthenticated: Please sign in again to discard pending changes.
syncBadge.discardErrorSyncing: Wait for the current sync to finish before discarding pending changes.
syncBadge.discardErrorCloudMissing: Could not restore: project not found in cloud.
syncBadge.discardErrorProjectMetadataPending: This project has pending home-page changes (description/spotlight/cover). Sync first to avoid losing that data.
syncBadge.discardErrorGeneric: Could not discard pending changes right now.

credits.title: Cloud sync credits
credits.howItWorks: Each section created or updated (title, content, etc.) = 1 credit. Reordering multiple sections = 1 credit total. Each section deleted = 1 credit.

settingsClient.baseFontSizeHelp: Base Size = font when the node has 100px. It scales proportionally with node size. Ex: Base=14 + Node=1000px = 140px font.
settingsClient.connectionAnimationHelp: Controls animated dash movement on all connections. Try different values to find the best visibility!
settingsClient.contentScaleHelp: 1.00 = 100% (normal). Example: 0.85 reduces text to 85%. Buttons are not affected.
settingsClient.crossReferencesAnimationHelp: Animation uses the same global settings (speed/distance) as other animated connections
settingsClient.crossReferencesDetectionHelp: References are detected automatically when you use $[Section Name] or $[#id] in content. Blue is recommended as it resembles hyperlinks!
settingsClient.crossReferencesHelp: When selecting a node, it shows blue links to sections referenced in content using $[Section Name] syntax
settingsClient.fadeEffectAdvancedHelp: Combine opacity, grayscale and blur to find the ideal effect. Recommended: opacity 0.3, grayscale 50, blur 1
settingsClient.fadeEffectHelp: When a node is selected, nodes NOT in the path are faded to highlight hierarchy.
settingsClient.fitViewMaxZoomHelp: Zoom limit on load - high values (5+) allow full zoom out to see everything.
settingsClient.fitViewPaddingHelp: Spacing around the map on load.
settingsClient.highlightLineHelp: The thickness and dashing of highlighted lines are proportional to zoom to keep a consistent visual.
settingsClient.minZoomHelp: Lowest possible zoom (the lower, the farther you can zoom out).
settingsClient.publicLinkHelp: This single link opens the Document and allows switching to Mind Map.
settingsClient.publicShareSaveHelp: Save settings to publish the link. Anyone with the token can open document and mind map.
settingsClient.simulationPhysicsHelp: Tune physics to control how nodes organize. Link = attraction to parents, Collision = avoid overlap, Iterations = calculation quality.
settingsClient.sunMarginHelp: Sun Margin = spacing between the central project and sections. Level Margin = spacing between parent and child nodes.
settingsClient.zoomOnClickHelp: When clicking any node, it will be enlarged to this size on screen. Ex: 200px = all nodes appear at 200px when clicked
